name: Pipeline Corridor Inspection Deployment
description: You are a UAS mission planner for ThermaGas Inspections AG. Prepare a complete corridor inspection deployment for a 1.2 km underground gas pipeline near Lake Greifensee, Zurich. The full operational deployment package with all specifications is at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/pipeline_ops_package.txt. Following the ops package, configure the vehicle safety parameters, create a corridor scan mission along the pipeline route using the specified thermal camera (you must calculate the flight altitude from camera specs and target GSD), set up the operational geofence with an inclusion boundary and exclusion zone, place the emergency rally points, and save the complete plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/pipeline_inspection.plan.
